market_residual_anchor.purpose: Use synchronized point-in-time 1X2/AH/OU as an information anchor and learn only residual information not already absorbed by the market.
market_residual_anchor.runtime_candidate: existing audited KL market-coordination runtime may execute on complete synchronized question-time snapshots
formal_promotion_requires: target-market LOMO when evaluating market value
market_residual_anchor.market_priority_note: AH information may be evaluated as a stronger anchor than traditional 1X2 only after competition-specific PIT validation; no global hard-coded market weight.

bayesian_dynamic_state_space_strength.purpose: Evolve competition-specific attack, defence and home-advantage latent states through time with uncertainty rather than relying only on fixed-decay summaries.
promotion_requires: state filtering without future smoothing leakage

player_xi_latent_strength.purpose: Represent the team actually expected to play using probabilistic XI, player ability, expected minutes, position, substitutes and availability uncertainty.
player_xi_latent_strength.observed_vs_predicted_rule: confirmed XI is an observed label only at its observed timestamp; predicted XI remains predicted and may never be rewritten as observed

event_value_feature_layer.purpose: Add provider-normalized xG, non-penalty xG, xT, OBV/VAEP-style event value and chance-generation features where timestamp-safe coverage exists.
event_value_feature_layer.provider_rule: provider definitions must be calibrated separately; raw metrics from different providers may not be pooled without mapping validation
promotion_requires: no duplicate counting with market or lineup layers

shot_quantity_quality_distribution.purpose: Model shot-count and shot-quality distributions upstream of P(T) and P(D|T,X) to increase fixture-level heterogeneity and reduce total/score Top-1 mode collapse.
shot_quantity_quality_distribution.formal_output_rule: may only influence formal output through a validated joint score matrix; no direct text-only override

competition_mixture_of_experts.purpose: Permit competition-specific experts and gating while sharing only algorithms and schema, never trained artifacts across competitions by default.

multihead_joint_projection.purpose: Allow auxiliary heads for 1X2, handicap/net-goal, total-goals and score-structure losses, then reconcile them into one final joint score matrix with auditable KL/IPF or equivalent constrained projection.
multihead_joint_projection.hard_rule: auxiliary heads never become separate formal probability truths; every formal market and score conclusion must be derived from one accepted final joint matrix

global_research_governance.promotion_policy: A module may receive non-zero formal influence only for competition-season pairs with an explicit hash-bound promotion receipt.
